case_title: EDWARDS, LINDA SUE VS MUNIZ, LUIS

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MUNIZ, LUIS HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $110.00 FILED BY EDWARDS, LINDA SUE AS TO DEFENDANT MUNIZ, LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-1989 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, LINDA SUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNIZ, LUIS $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $6.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $106.00, FOR THE X-COMPLT JUDGMENT ORDERED FOR CROSS-PLTF AND AGAINST X-DEFT FOR $100 PRINCIPAL $21 COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-24-1995, DENIED
